title: eriosema strictum
intro: Eriosema strictum is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eriosema strictum include its use in treating various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in African medicine to treat various health conditions.
